Hero.title: Hi, I'm Federico Aniello
Hero.subtitle: Front-end Developer
Hero.description: I build beautiful and functional web experiences. With 4+ years in the field, I specialize in creating modern, responsive, and user-centric web applications.

About.title: About Me
About.paragraph1: I am a passionate front-end developer with a strong focus on creating elegant and effective user interfaces. My journey in web development started over 4 years ago, and since then, I've been dedicated to learning and mastering modern web technologies.
About.paragraph2: I have extensive experience with component-based frameworks, including 3 years working with Vue and 2 years with Angular. This background has given me a deep understanding of state management, component architecture, and building scalable applications.
About.paragraph3: I thrive on solving complex problems and turning ideas into reality. I'm always eager to take on new challenges and collaborate with teams to build amazing products.

Contact.title: Contact Me
Contact.description: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? Fill out the form below and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
Contact.error_message: Something went wrong. Please try again.
